A pair k only touches values {2k-1, 2k}, so ranges that do not\n// overlap with the current value are mathematically no-ops and can be skipped.\nghost function ApplyPairsRange(v: int, lo: nat, hi: nat): int\n  requires 1 <= lo <= hi\n  decreases hi - lo\n{\n  if v < 2 * lo - 1 || v > 2 * hi then\n    v\n  else if lo == hi then\n    ApplyPairToVal(v, lo)\n  else\n    var mid := lo + (hi - lo) / 2;\n    ApplyPairsRange(ApplyPairsRange(v, lo, mid), mid + 1, hi)\n}\n\n// The complete result of Mishka's Adjacent Replacements Algorithm on a single\n// value: apply all NUM_PAIRS pairs (i.e., all 10^9 replacement steps).\nghost function MishkaAlgorithm(v: int): int\n  requires 1 <= v <= 2 * NUM_PAIRS\n{\n  ApplyPairsRange(v, 1, NUM_PAIRS)\n}\n\n// b is the correct output of Mishka's algorithm applied element-wise to a.\nghost predicate IsCorrectResult(a: seq<int>, b: seq<int>)\n  requires forall i | 0 <= i < |a| :: 1 <= a[i] <= 1000000000\n{\n  |b| == |a| &&\n  forall i | 0 <= i < |a| :: b[i] == MishkaAlgorithm(a[i])\n}\n\n// Key lemma: ApplyPairsRange either makes an even value odd (v-1) or leaves odd values unchanged.\nlemma ApplyPairsRangeLemma(v: int, lo: nat, hi: nat)\n  requires 1 <= lo <= hi\n  ensures ApplyPairsRange(v, lo, hi) == if (v % 2 == 0 && v >= 2 * lo - 1 && v <= 2 * hi) then v - 1 else v\n  decreases hi - lo\n{\n  if v < 2 * lo - 1 || v > 2 * hi {\n  } else if lo == hi {\n  } else {\n    var mid := lo + (hi - lo) / 2;\n    ApplyPairsRangeLemma(v, lo, mid);\n    var v1 := ApplyPairsRange(v, lo, mid);\n    ApplyPairsRangeLemma(v1, mid + 1, hi);\n  }\n}\n\nlemma MishkaLemma(v: int)\n  requires 1 <= v <= 2 * NUM_PAIRS\n  ensures MishkaAlgorithm(v) == if v % 2 == 0 then v - 1 else v\n{\n  ApplyPairsRangeLemma(v, 1, NUM_PAIRS);\n}\n\nmethod AdjacentReplacements(a: seq<int>) returns (b: seq<int>)\n  requires forall i | 0 <= i < |a| :: 1 <= a[i] <= 1000000000\n  ensures IsCorrectResult(a, b)\n{\n  b := [];\n  for i := 0 to |a|\n    invariant |b| == i\n    invariant forall j | 0 <= j < i :: b[j] == MishkaAlgorithm(a[j])\n  {\n    MishkaLemma(a[i]);\n    if a[i] % 2 == 0 {\n      b := b + [a[i] - 1];\n    } else {\n      b := b + [a[i]];\n    }\n  }\n}\n"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":2,"cache_creation_input_tokens":10901,"cache_read_input_tokens":8610,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":10901},"output_tokens":11,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"e93b12f0-edb5-4e24-8722-492d0b0b5191","uuid":"fa3744e2-48c0-4f7f-b437-179031abfc95"},{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01DfGzbnUB456MybrYqWjX9f","type":"tool_result","content":"File created successfully at: /Users/mchiesa/work/projects/2026-02-dafny-liftings/smt_analysis/results/0016_1006_A/verified.dfy"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"e93b12f0-edb5-4e24-8722-492d0b0b5191","uuid":"5a501127-d621-4288-969c-54af619af417","timestamp":"2026-03-17T19:05:58.220Z","tool_use_result":{"type":"create","filePath":"/Users/mchiesa/work/projects/2026-02-dafny-liftings/smt_analysis/results/0016_1006_A/verified.dfy","content":"// Number of adjacent pairs in Mishka's algorithm: (1,2), (3,4), ..., (10^9-1, 10^9)\nconst NUM_PAIRS: nat := 500000000\n\n// A single replacement operation from the problem statement:\n// \"Replace each occurrence of `from` with `to`\" applied to one value.\nghost function ReplaceVal(v: int, from: int, to: int): int\n{\n  if v == from then to else v\n}\n\n// Apply pair k of Mishka's algorithm to a single value.\n// Pair k consists of two sequential steps from the problem statement:\n//   Step 2k-1: \"Replace each occurrence of (2k-1) with 2k\"\n//   Step 2k:   \"Replace each occurrence of 2k with (2k-1)\"\nghost function ApplyPairToVal(v: int, k: nat): int\n  requires k >= 1\n{\n  ReplaceVal(ReplaceVal(v, 2 * k - 1, 2 * k), 2 * k, 2 * k - 1)\n}\n\n// Apply pairs lo through hi (inclusive) to value v, in sequential order.\n// Faithfully models the sequential application of each pair from the problem\n// statement. 2;\n    ApplyPairsRange(ApplyPairsRange(v, lo, mid), mid + 1, hi)\n}\n\n// The complete result of Mishka's Adjacent Replacements Algorithm on a single\n// value: apply all NUM_PAIRS pairs (i.e., all applied element-wise to a.\nghost predicate IsCorrectResult(a: seq<int>, b: seq<int>)\n  requires forall i | 0 <= i < |a| :: 1 <= a[i] <= 1000000000\n{\n  |b| == |a| &&\n  forall i | 0 <= i < |a| :: b[i] == MishkaAlgorithm(a[i])\n}\n\n// Key lemma: ApplyPairsRange either makes an even value odd (v-1) or leaves odd values unchanged.\nlemma ApplyPairsRangeLemma(v: int, lo: nat, hi: nat)\n  requires 1 <= lo <= hi\n  ensures ApplyPairsRange(v, lo, hi) == if (v % 2 == 0 && v >= 2 * lo - 1 && v <= 2 * hi) then v - 1 else v\n  decreases hi - lo\n{\n  if v < 2 * lo - 1 || v > 2 * hi {\n  } else if lo == hi {\n  } else {\n    var mid := lo + (hi - lo) / 2;\n    ApplyPairsRangeLemma(v, lo, mid);\n    var v1 := ApplyPairsRange(v, lo, mid);\n    ApplyPairsRangeLemma(v1, mid + 1, hi);\n  }\n}\n\nlemma MishkaLemma(v: int)\n  requires 1 <= v <= 2 * NUM_PAIRS\n  ensures MishkaAlgorithm(v) == if v % 2 == 0 then v - 1 else v\n{\n  ApplyPairsRangeLemma(v, 1, NUM_PAIRS);\n}\n\nmethod The proof strategy:\n\n1. **`ApplyPairsRangeLemma`** — proves by structural induction (following the divide-and-conquer recursion) that `ApplyPairsRange(v, lo, hi)` equals `v - 1` when v is even and in range `[2*lo-1, 2*hi]`, and `v` otherwise. The key insight: after the first recursive half processes an even value, the result is odd and falls outside the second half's range, so it passes through unchanged.\n\n2. **`MishkaLemma`** — instantiates the range lemma with `lo=1, hi=NUM_PAIRS` to get the closed-form: `MishkaAlgorithm(v) == if v % 2 == 0 then v - 1 else v`.\n\n3. **Loop invariants** — track that `|b| == i` and all elements computed so far match `MishkaAlgorithm`, calling `MishkaLemma` at each iteration to justify the if/else branch."}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":223,"cache_read_input_tokens":30623,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":223},"output_tokens":2,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"e93b12f0-edb5-4e24-8722-492d0b0b5191","uuid":"be3c9694-76fc-49c0-9dae-bd4fe5252310"},{"type":"result","subtype":"success","is_error":false,"duration_ms":167002,"duration_api_ms":164961,"num_turns":4,"result":"Verified successfully.
